title: ScreenResult
description: Canonical artifact for client-side screening runs. Written by the execution skill after evaluating SCREENING.md, calling screen_fund_tokens (or skipping runs when input is missing), and aggregating results. Non-invention rule: runs that depend on unavailable input must be recorded as skipped/failed with a reason, never filled with invented values.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this artifact was produced.

snapshot_date.description: Optional snapshot date used for screening (YYYY-MM-DD); present if a single date was used across runs.

runs.description: One entry per run defined in SCREENING.md (executed, skipped, or failed). Order matches evaluation order.

run_id.description: Stable id for this run (e.g. template id, profile id, or ordinal).

status.description: executed: screen_fund_tokens was called and returned. skipped_missing_input: condition required input (e.g. risk_on) that was not provided; no value invented. skipped_condition_false: conditional run's condition evaluated false. failed_validation: request invalid (e.g. bad selector). failed_error: API or network error.

scope.description: Present when status is executed; scope used for screen_fund_tokens.

template_id.description: Present when run was driven by a library template id.

profile_id.description: Present when run was driven by a fund profile id from screening_policy.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for skip/failure (e.g. 'risk_on not provided; do not invent'). Omitted when status is executed.

result_count.description: Present when status is executed; number of rows returned.

candidates.description: Deduplicated candidate list from executed runs only. Each candidate includes identity fields and LLM-supplied candidate_reason.

token_id.description: Primary token id from screening results.

candidate_reason.description: Short LLM-forced reasoning for why this token is a candidate (required for each candidate).

source_run_ids.description: Run ids that produced this token (e.g. ['momentum_combo_v1', 'social_conviction_v1']).

indicator_snapshot.description: Optional copy of indicator fields returned for this token (score_*, kpi_*) from the screening response.
